news.title: Education Minnesota endorses Morrison for Congress
news.summary_en: Education Minnesota has endorsed the reelection campaign of U.S. Rep. Kelly Morrison in Minnesota’s 3rd Congressional District.

news.title: St. Louis Park educator David Davis is 2026 Minnesota Teacher of the Year
news.summary_en: David Davis, an instrumental and general music teacher at Park Spanish Immersion Elementary in the St. Louis Park school district, is the 2026 Minnesota Teacher of the Year.
